title: phyllanthus avicularis
intro: Phyllanthus avicularis, also known as the tropical phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus avicularis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and reduce the severity of fever. Phyllanthus avicularis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
